chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-439 of 2022 (Ali Hassan Kharose and another Vs. The State and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of MA No. 3654/2022 (Stay) 05-1-2-2023. Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso advocate for the applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. ******** The applicants by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C have impugned order dated 01-08-2022 passed by learned Incharge Judicial Magistrate/Consumer Protection Court, Ghotki, whereby they have been joined as an accused to face trial in case outcome of FIR/Crime No. 22/2021 u/s 302, 337A(i), F(i), 147, 148, 149 PPC of PS B-Section Ghotki. No illegality is noticed in impugned order, which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application. It is dismissed accordingly directing the applicants to prove their innocence by joining the trial. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
